summary.lv: inGain (Latvijas B2B fintech startups, kas piedāvā no-code SaaS Loan/Subscription/Rentals platformas) meklē IT projektu vadītāju ar 5+ gadu pieredzi liela mēroga, sarežģītu sistēmu projektu vadībā.
summary.en: inGain (a Latvian B2B fintech startup providing no-code SaaS Loan/Subscription/Rentals platforms) is hiring an IT Project Manager with 5+ years of experience leading large-scale, complex system projects.
